hooks.command: echo '[Fleet Maintenance] Read CLAUDE.md + .ai/ before codegen. Gates: /before-codegen -> generate -> /after-codegen. Guardrails GR-01..GR-12 are enforced.'

echo '[Guardrail reminder] GR-02 no secrets in source - GR-04 domain has no framework imports - GR-06 Kafka common envelope - GR-07 controllers implement generated OpenAPI interfaces - GR-08 RFC 7807 errors. Run /after-codegen before delivery.'
echo '[Delivery gate] If code was generated, run /after-codegen (mvn verify, checkstyle, spotbugs, contract tests, Kafka event validation) and record results in ai-delivery-log.md.'
